prompt: How do I reset my password?
completion: Go to Settings > Account > Reset Password. Click the reset link and check your email for the verification code.

prompt: What are your business hours?
completion: We are open Monday to Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM EST. Weekend support is available via email only.

prompt: How can I cancel my subscription?
completion: You can cancel anytime from Settings > Billing > Cancel Plan. Your access continues until the end of the billing cycle.

prompt: Do you offer refunds?
completion: Yes we offer full refunds within 14 days of purchase. Contact support with your order ID and we will process it within 2-3 business days.

prompt: How do I update my payment method?
completion: Go to Settings > Billing > Payment Methods. You can add a new card or update your existing one there.

prompt: What payment methods do you accept?
completion: We accept Visa Mastercard American Express and PayPal. We also support bank transfers for annual plans.

prompt: How do I contact support?
completion: You can reach us via live chat on our website email at support@company.com or call us at 1-800-123-4567.

prompt: Is there a free trial?
completion: Yes we offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required to start.

prompt: How do I upgrade my plan?
completion: Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Select your new plan and confirm. The upgrade takes effect immediately.

prompt: Can I export my data?
completion: Yes go to Settings > Data > Export. You can download all your data as CSV or JSON files.

prompt: How do I add team members?
completion: Go to Settings > Team > Invite Members. Enter their email addresses and select their role permissions.

prompt: What is your uptime guarantee?
completion: We guarantee 99.9% uptime. Check our status page at status.company.com for real-time service health.

prompt: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
completion: Go to Settings > Security > 2FA. You can use an authenticator app or SMS verification.

prompt: Can I change my username?
completion: Yes go to Settings > Profile > Edit. You can change your username once every 30 days.

prompt: How do I delete my account?
completion: Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. Note that this action is permanent and all data will be removed after 30 days.

prompt: What browsers do you support?
completion: We support the latest versions of Chrome Firefox Safari and Edge. For the best experience we recommend Chrome.

prompt: How do I report a bug?
completion: Click the Help icon in the bottom right corner and select Report a Bug. Include screenshots if possible.

prompt: Do you have a mobile app?
completion: Yes our app is available on both iOS and Android. Search for our name in the App Store or Google Play.

prompt: How do I change my email address?
completion: Go to Settings > Profile > Email. Enter your new email and verify it through the confirmation link.

prompt: What is your data retention policy?
completion: We retain your data for 90 days after account deletion. You can request immediate deletion by contacting support.

prompt: How do I set up notifications?
completion: Go to Settings > Notifications. You can customize email push and in-app notification preferences.

prompt: Can I use the API?
completion: Yes we have a REST API available on all paid plans. Check our developer docs at docs.company.com/api for details.

prompt: How do I share a project?
completion: Click the Share button on any project page. You can share via link email or invite specific team members.

prompt: What file formats do you support?
completion: We support PDF DOCX XLSX PNG JPG and CSV files. Maximum file size is 25MB per upload.

prompt: How do I change the language?
completion: Go to Settings > Preferences > Language. We currently support English Spanish French German and Japanese.

prompt: Is my data encrypted?
completion: Yes all data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3.

prompt: How do I merge duplicate contacts?
completion: Go to Contacts > Tools > Find Duplicates. Review the suggestions and click Merge for each pair.

prompt: Can I schedule reports?
completion: Yes go to Reports > Schedule. You can set up daily weekly or monthly automated reports sent to your email.

prompt: How do I integrate with Slack?
completion: Go to Settings > Integrations > Slack. Click Connect and authorize our app in your Slack workspace.

prompt: What happens when my trial ends?
completion: Your account switches to the free plan with limited features. Your data is preserved and you can upgrade anytime.
